commands.review_summary:
The branch centralizes UI/TUI session-key matching, uses `chat.history` metadata for startup hydration, defers chat auth-status refresh, and preserves queued global sends until default-agent metadata is known.

PR surface: Source -34, Tests +121. Total +87 across 11 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the merge blocker: `git merge-tree` against the PR base, current main, and PR head reproduces a concrete `ui/src/ui/app-gateway.ts` conflict. Runtime behavior was not re-run in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Needs maintainer final-head review and conflict resolution for a protected, broad session/message-routing PR; this is not a narrow autonomous repair lane.

target.title: perf: streamline chat startup metadata
target.body:
## Summary
- Make `chat.history` return enough persisted and synthetic session metadata for startup hydration so the web UI can skip the startup `sessions.list` follow-up.
- Centralize UI/TUI/global-session key matching helpers so `/new`, `/reset`, chat send, run lifecycle, and gateway hydration share the same selected-agent rules.
- Defer model auth status refresh when opening the chat tab so chat/history paint is not blocked by auth probing.
- Preserve queued global sends until defaults/hello agent metadata is known, so they do not get pinned to `main` too early.

## Verification
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check ui/src/ui/session-key.ts ui/src/ui/app-chat.ts ui/src/ui/app-chat.test.ts src/routing/session-key.ts src/routing/session-key.test.ts src/tui/tui-session-actions.ts src/gateway/server.chat.gateway-server-chat-b.test.ts`
- `pnpm tsgo:test:ui`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/app-chat.test.ts src/routing/session-key.test.ts src/tui/tui-session-actions.test.ts src/gateway/server.chat.gateway-server-chat-b.test.ts`
- `/Users/steipete/Projects/agent-scripts/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` -> clean, no accepted/actionable findings

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: startup and reset/new command latency from redundant session discovery and duplicate UI-side session-key logic.
Real environment tested: local gateway plus authenticated Control UI and TUI tmux sessions.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: opened `http://127.0.0.1:18789/chat?session=main`, inspected startup RPC traffic, then exercised `/new` and `/reset` in the TUI under tmux.
Evidence after fix: web startup used `chat.history`, `models.list`, `commands.list`, and deferred `models.authStatus`; it did not issue the startup `sessions.list` follow-up. TUI `/new` switched locally without a gateway RPC, and `/reset` issued only `sessions.reset` without follow-up `chat.history` or `sessions.list`.
Observed result after fix: `chat.history` carried enough session metadata for startup hydration; the TUI command path stayed single-RPC or local-only where expected.
What was not tested: full cross-platform release checks; PR CI remains the broad gate.
target.author: steipete
